assets.name: The Eagle
assets.description: Digby's flagship during the 1628 Mediterranean voyage.

assets.name: The Elisabeth and George
assets.description: The secondary vessel in the Scanderoon fleet.

assets.name: Thomas Allen's Burning Glass
assets.description: A lens used for solar calcination, bequeathed by his mentor.
assets.mechanic: Increases success rate of 'Athanor' operations by 20% in sunlight.

assets.name: Stelliana's Tress
assets.description: A bracelet of Venetia's hair. Radiates a subtle sympathetic resonance.
assets.mechanic: Required for higher-tier 'Weapon Salve' sympathetic healing.

locations.name: Milos
locations.description: The island where Loose Fantasies was penned amidst privateering.
locations.mechanic: Safe harbor; increases 'Mastery' gain while writing Log.

locations.name: Scanderoon (Alexandretta)
locations.description: Site of the 1628 battle against Venetian and French forces.
locations.mechanic: High-risk encounter zone; prize money potential.

plot_arcs.title: The Honor of Stelliana
plot_arcs.summary: Protecting Venetia's reputation against the scandals of Morea (London).

plot_arcs.title: The Privateer's Defense
plot_arcs.summary: Navigating the thin line between piracy and heroism to clear the Digby name.

mechanics.name: Vital Spirit Pulse
mechanics.logic: Advisors (Allen, Venetia) generate Spirit. Stigma slows the pulse.

mechanics.name: Chymical Verse
mechanics.logic: In Gresham, write poems to convert 'Grief' or 'Annoy' into 'Philosophical Proof'.
mechanics.outcome: Increases Knowledge and Influence at Court.
